payload.answer: I found a conflict: I already have Sara recorded as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. I did not update the memory. Please clarify whether this is the same Sara, a different Sara, or a correction.

entity_resolution.reason: The input names Sara, matching an existing person, but the asserted relationship 'niece' conflicts with the existing relationship 'daughter'. This could be a correction, a different Sara, or an unusual family relationship, so it should not be merged or committed without clarification.

details: Conflict detected between existing and new family relationship.

repair_options: Confirm Sara is your daughter and reject the niece statement.
Confirm Sara is your niece and replace the daughter relationship.
Clarify that there are two different people named Sara, one your daughter and one your niece.
Clarify that the same Sara is both your daughter and your niece due to family circumstances.
